title: Restriction on pay in lieu of holiday
content:
(1)	
Subject to subsection (2), no payment of holiday pay payable 
under section 40, or other sum, shall be made in lieu of the 
grant of a holiday.
	
(2)	
Notwithstanding subsection (1), where a contract of 
employment of an employee is terminated, holiday pay in 
respect of a holiday granted as an alternative holiday or 
substituted holiday under section 39(2), (2A) or (3) prior to 
the termination of the contract of employment but falling after 
such termination shall be paid to that employee as soon as is 
practicable but in any case not later than 7 days after the day 
of termination; and such holiday pay shall be calculated in 
accordance with section 41 as if the contract of employment 
had not been terminated. (Amended 137 of 1997 s. 4; 7 of 
2007 s. 11)
(Added 48 of 1984 s. 18)
Last updated date
1.1.2024
Employment Ordinance

8-8
